title: WafActiveRule
description: An active WAF rule that is currently enforced on a firewall.

id.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the active rule.

status.description: The enforcement status of the rule.

revision.description: The revision number of the rule.

created_at.description: The date and time the active rule was created.

updated_at.description: The date and time the active rule was last updated.
